ops.title: getaway v2: create and validate data registries (cli/getaway/data/)
ops.description: Extract programs.json (26+british+iberia), banks.json, transfer_partners.json, seat_quality.json (~100 rows), regions.json (~40 codes), factors.json (12-factor judgment registry) from repo prose; research status_earning.json + points_pricing.json from program docs with sourced notes. Read only via registry.py / `getaway registry ...`.

ops.text: jq empty passes on all 8 files in cli/getaway/data/
row counts reconcile against source tables (28 programs, 4 banks, ~100 seat-quality rows, ~40 regions, 12 factors)
every status_earning/points_pricing row carries a sourced note; uncertain rows say so
